Boulder Dash NX
meta.desc:
Your goal is to collect all diamonds. You can walk up, down, left and right, but not diagonal. Sometimes the diamonds are under rocks and you have to put the rocks away. You can do that by pushing them left or right if no other rocks, diamonds or dirt is behind them. If you walk under a rock, nothing happens, but if a rock or a diamond falls on you, you die and you have to repeat the cave. There is no life to lose:-).
The butterflies want to kill you, avoid to touch them. After collected all diamonds the cave is complete and you get the next. You have to complete 6 caves.
Sometimes you get stuck between the rocks or you cant reach all diamonds.
Then press Left+A for reboot the cave.

meta.name: Dungeon of Doom (turn-based game)
meta.desc:
You "were" the KING, until your enemies cast you into the Dungeon of Doom. Can you avoid deadly beasts, cursed statues, and greed for gold, and escape the dungeon and regain your throne?
Find both halves of a crown in each level of the dungeon, and rise in rank and honor. But if you get too greedy for gold, you will be expelled from your kingdom! You MUST rise to the rank of KING, AND escape the dungeon...
Good luck...

meta.name: Flight stimulator
meta.desc: "Flight stimulator" is a game developed using LowRes NX. In "Flight stimulator" the player controls a plane flying over a landscape. Pressing the button (A) activates the autoscroll mode, while the button (B) deactivates it. Using the left and right directional keys the player can control the plane manually. The game was discussed in the forum, with the developer Timo giving helpful tips on how to improve the background design and programming.

meta.name: Medieval Checkers game
meta.desc:
Similar to the game STRATEGO, try to defeat all 3 enemy kingdoms before they destroy you!
Each player takes their turn moving one moveable piece up, down, left, right either onto empty land or to attack an enemy piece
A player is defeated and all their pieces removed from the board if their castle is attacked by ANY moveable enemy piece
When a piece attempts to move onto a space occupied by an enemy piece, they are attacking that piece.... the results follow the PIECE RULES below...

meta.name: Minesweeper
meta.desc: Minesweeper - LowRes NX is a version of the classic Minesweeper game developed for the virtual console LowRes NX. This platform is retro-inspired and mimics the graphical and gameplay limitations of old consoles. In this version, players experience the traditional Minesweeper game, where they uncover tiles on a grid while avoiding hidden mines. The usual Minesweeper mechanics are in place, such as numbers indicating the proximity of mines, as well as the challenge of clearing the grid without triggering any mines.

meta.name: Orbital swing
meta.desc: This is a game where you fling “orbitals” (basically just balls that orbit around you) around the battlefield in order to damage the enemy's. The goal is to have all enemy's dead at one time but if are too slow to killing them all than they will respawn. If you hold the A button than you can manipulate the way the orbitals move around you. Also your health is displayed as a heart at the top left of the screen. It cracks as you take damage.
